name: Coast Tradelines
description_short: Coast Tradelines is a credit repair provider based in New York, New York. Rated 4.9/5 with 55 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Coast Tradelines is a credit repair provider serving clients in New York, New York. Carrying a 4.9/5.0 Google rating from 55 reviews, Coast Tradelines has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the New York area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a financial consultant, Coast Tradelines provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in New York, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Coast Tradelines operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the New York, New York area who are considering Coast Tradelines should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
